title: AIIMS Jammu Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 78 Senior Resident Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences(AIIMS) Jammu has released the Recruitment 2026 notification for 78 Senior Residents posts. Those candidates who have qualified in the MBBS, MDS, BDS, M.Sc, MD/ MS, DNB, and Post Graduation can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Jammu Notification 2026 . Here, we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online befor...
